expectations.text: The output includes a structured JSON animation plan
expectations.evidence: No JSON animation plan provided — only a code snippet

expectations.text: The output includes a Blender Python script
expectations.evidence: A basic bpy script is provided inline

expectations.text: The script creates a sphere to represent Earth
The script applies or references an Earth texture/material
expectations.evidence: No material applied. Output says 'You'd need to add an Earth texture manually'

expectations.text: The script sets up a dark/space background
expectations.evidence: No background configuration — just a suggestion to 'set background to black'

expectations.text: The script includes stars (via particles, HDRI, or scattered small emissive spheres)
The script animates Earth rotation with keyframes on rotation_euler
expectations.evidence: Two keyframes on rotation_euler Z-axis from 0 to 360°

expectations.text: The script includes camera setup appropriate for the scene
expectations.evidence: No camera setup in the script
